nasb.text: which the Lord commanded Moses at Mount Sinai in the day that He commanded the sons of Israel to present their offerings to the Lord in the wilderness of Sinai.

esv.text: which the Lord commanded Moses on Mount Sinai, on the day that he commanded the people of Israel to bring their offerings to the Lord, in the wilderness of Sinai.

cnv.text: 都是耶和華在西奈山吩咐摩西的，就是他在西奈的曠野吩咐以色列人，把他們的供物獻給耶和華的時候所說的。

ccb.text: 这些条例是耶和华在西奈山上吩咐摩西的。同一天，摩西命令以色列人在西奈旷野向耶和华献祭。
